# Basic protocol filters
tcp
udp
icmp
arp
ip
ip6
sctp

# Direction + protocol
src host 192.168.1.1
dst host 10.0.0.1
host 172.16.0.1
src net 192.168.0.0/16
dst net 10.0.0.0/8
src port 80
dst port 443
port 8080
portrange 8000-9000

# Combined filters
tcp dst port 80
udp src port 53
tcp port 80 and host 192.168.1.1
tcp port 80 or udp port 53
not tcp
tcp and not port 22

# EtherType
ether proto 0x0800
ether proto 0x86dd

# Ethernet addresses
ether src 00:11:22:33:44:55
ether dst ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
ether host 00:11:22:33:44:55

# TCP flags
tcp[tcpflags] & tcp-syn != 0
tcp[tcpflags] & (tcp-syn|tcp-ack) != 0
tcp[tcpflags] == tcp-syn
tcp[13] & 0x02 != 0

# IP header fields
ip[8] < 64
ip proto 6
ip proto 17

# IPv6
ip6 src host ::1
ip6 dst host fe80::1
icmp6

# Byte offset access
ether[0] & 1 != 0
ip[0] & 0xf != 5

# Broadcast / multicast
ether broadcast
ether multicast
ip multicast

# Length
less 100
greater 1000
len >= 64
len <= 1500

# VLAN
vlan
vlan 100
vlan and tcp port 80

# Complex expressions
(tcp or udp) and port 53
tcp dst port 5555 and tcp[tcpflags] == tcp-syn
src net 192.168.0.0/24 and dst port 80
ip and not ip multicast
